DMOs Pipeline documentation
===========================

DMOs Pipeline is a Python workflow for processing bilateral foot-mounted IMU
recordings and preparing stride-level outputs for Digital Mobility Outcome
extraction.

The package currently includes:

* gaitmap-based gait processing
* stride-level temporal and spatial parameter extraction
* recording and wearing-time estimation
* event and stride-level quality control
* structured CSV and JSON outputs

Contents
--------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   api
